title: ContactNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-email-sms-contact-rs (transactional/outreach email + SMS). Other services publish send-requests onto the email/sms send lanes; the contact server consumes them via a shared queue group (each request delivered once), sends via SendGrid/SES (email) or Twilio (SMS) with rate limiting, and publishes a per-send result summary. Payloads carry recipient + subject/body and must never contain provider API keys.

$dd:nats.summary: Email + SMS send-request lanes plus a result fan-out.

subjects.name: ContactEmailSend
subjects.description: Send-an-email requests consumed by dd-email-sms-contact-rs via the dd-email-sms-contact queue group (each request handled once across replicas). Payload: { to, subject, html, [text], [from] }.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contact.email.send

subjects.name: ContactSmsSend
subjects.description: Send-an-SMS requests consumed by dd-email-sms-contact-rs via the dd-email-sms-contact queue group. Payload: { to, body }.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contact.sms.send

subjects.name: ContactSendResults
subjects.description: Per-send result summaries published after each email/sms attempt (channel, recipient, ok, transport, upstream status). Carries no message bodies or secrets.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contact.results

queueGroups.name: ContactSendQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group for dd-email-sms-contact-rs workers consuming the email/sms send lanes (once-only delivery across replicas).
